name: bestdel
description: BestDel — AI multi-model MUN research assistant.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c bgBlue,bgGreen "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
